summary: The diff implements most requirements well. REQ-1 through REQ-5 are substantially implemented. REQ-6 (backend staff role permission checks) is partially addressed but the diff evidence is truncated and unclear about the full implementation. One notable gap: REQ-3 requires admin to update complaint priority in addition to status, but no separate priority-update endpoint is clearly visible. The admin dashboard and portal pages exist and are functional. Staff portal is implemented with department-scoped views. ProfileSetupModal includes admin and staff roles.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin can view and update status/priority for any complaint regardless of department
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows useUpdateComplaintStatus handles status updates only. No priority update mutation or backend endpoint for updating complaint priority is visible in the diff. The ComplaintsListPage shows status update dropdowns but no priority update UI for admin.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend CampusRole type or equivalent includes 'staff' as a valid role and permission checks allow staff to update complaint status
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and only shows a comment referencing staff. There is no visible CampusRole variant for 'staff' nor a clear permission check allowing staff to call updateComplaintStatus in the visible portion of the diff.
